Issues: The technical execution and artistic style are very basic and simplistic. While this is fine for some artistic niches, it lacks the high detail or complex composition usually required for premium commercial illustration sales.
The overall composition is very straightforward. To increase commercial appeal, adding more dynamic movement, richer textures, or a more complex background might increase its perceived value.

The current presentation is suitable for free use or low-cost licensing, but it might not command high prices as a standalone piece of commercial art without additional artistic refinement or context.
